query_normalized: predicting sleep stage transitions from scalp eeg using deep learning neuroscience
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it measures the same biological domain (sleep stages from EEG/PSG) and applies the same mechanism (deep learning) to the user's specific problem, even though it focuses on static classification rather than explicit transition modeling. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and canonical methodology for deep learning approaches in sleep stage analysis that a literature review on this topic must cite.
